title: Indian Army Agniveer Recruitment Rally (General Duty, Technical, Clerk, Store Keeper Technical, Tradesmen, Nursing Assistant, Havildar, Junior Commissioned Officer, Sepoy Pharma)
eligibility:
Eligibility criteria vary by post:

**Agniveer General Duty (GD):** Class 10th/Matric pass with 45% marks in aggregate (of five subjects) and a minimum of 33% in each subject.

**Agniveer Technical:** 10+2 (Intermediate) in Science with Physics, Chemistry, Maths, and English with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks and 40% in each subject OR 10+2 with 1 year ITI.

**Agniveer Clerk/Store Keeper Technical:** 10+2 (Intermediate) in any stream with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks and 50% in each subject. Securing 50% in English and Maths/Accounts/Book Keeping in Class XII is mandatory.

**Agniveer Tradesman (10th Pass):** Class 10th pass with a minimum of 33% in each subject.

**Agniveer Tradesman (8th Pass):** Class 8th pass with a minimum of 33% in each subject.

**Soldier Technical (Nursing Assistant/NA Vet):** 10+2 (Intermediate) PCB with 50% aggregate and 40% in each subject.

**Sepoy Pharma:** 10+2 (Intermediate) PCB with 50% aggregate + D.Pharma with 55% or B.Pharma with 50% and registered with the State Pharmacy Council.

**Junior Commissioned Officer (Religious Teacher):** Specific religious qualification + Bachelor Degree.

**General Physical Requirements:** Minimum height of 170 cm (with regional relaxations), chest 77 cm unexpanded with 5 cm expansion. Candidates must be unmarried.

eligibility: Candidates must hold a graduate degree in any discipline from a recognised university or any equivalent qualifications recognised by the central government. eligibility: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. For Assistant Professor (Grade-I): At least 3 years of post-Ph.D industrial/ research/ teaching experience. For Associate Professor: A minimum 6 years of teaching/research/industrial experience of which minimum 3 years should be at the level of Assistant Professor (pay level 12) in IITs / IISc Bangalore /IIMs /IISERs or in the institutes of national importance or Indian/Foreign Institutes of equivalent standards/Senior Scientist in the reputed National/International research organizations/ Industries at the time of application. For Assistant Professor Grade II, candidates with less than three years (post Ph.D.) industrial, research, or teaching experience will be considered.

Nationality: Must be a citizen of India, or a subject of Bhutan or Nepal, or a Tibetan refugee who came to India before January 1, 1962, with the intention of permanent settlement, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from specific countries (Burma, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Malawi, Ethiopia, Zaire, Zambia, Vietnam) with the intention of permanent settlement in India. Age Limit: Minimum age is 18 years. Maximum age is 30 or 32 years depending on the post. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

title: SSC CGL 2024
eligibility: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university or institution. Nationality criteria: Citizen of India, Nepal, or Bhutan, or a Tibetan refugee who came to India before January 1, 1962. Specific posts may have additional educational qualifications (e.g., Statistics as a subject at the degree level) and physical standards.

title: UP Police SI Recruitment 2024
eligibility: Candidates must possess a graduation degree in any discipline. For further details, refer to the official notification.

title: Laboratory Attendant
eligibility: 10th Pass with Science subjects

For Havildar: Medalist at Junior/Senior level representing State in National competitions or represented Country at International level (Individual event); represented a State or Country in National or International competitions at Junior/Senior level (Team event); Medalist in Khelo India Games, Youth Games, and University Games. For Naib Subedar: Winner of any medal in World Championship/Asian Championships, Asian Games, Commonwealth Games/World Cup; represented India twice in Asian Games/Commonwealth Games/World Cup; represented India in Olympics.

title: KVS & NVS Recruitment 2025
eligibility: Educational qualifications vary by post. OR Higher Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and a 2-year Diploma in Education (Special Education) OR Graduation and 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education. Must have passed the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) conducted by WBBPE as per NCTE guidelines.

eligibility: Only female candidates. Must be a domicile of Punjab. Anganwadi Worker (AWW): Graduation degree with Punjabi as a subject in 10th class. Anganwadi Helper (AWH): 12th pass with Punjabi as a subject in 10th class. For AWH, 10th pass is also mentioned as minimum qualification in some sources, with preference for higher qualifications. Nationality: Citizen of India, or subject of Nepal or Bhutan, or a Tibetan refugee who came to India before January 1, 1962, with the intention of permanent settlement, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from Burma, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Vietnam, or East African countries (Zaire, Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, Ethiopia, Malawi) with the intention of permanent settlement in India.

title: RRB Junior Engineer (JE) 2025
eligibility: Three years of Diploma in Engineering in any discipline from a recognized University, or a Bachelor's Degree in Science with Physics and Chemistry with a minimum of 45% marks from a recognized University, and Knowledge of any computer language will be essential. eligibility: Candidates must have passed 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, or Graduation. For Trade Apprentices (ITI/DEO), qualifications acquired between 01.04.2021 and 31.12.2025 are considered. Qualification acquired through part-time/correspondence/distance learning is not eligible.

OR Master's Degree from a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi and English as the compulsory or elective subjects or either of the two as a medium of examination and the other as a compulsory or elective subject at the degree level with 60% marks (for SC/ST 55% marks). Candidates must possess proof of passing the qualifying examination by 30th November 2025.

eligibility: Candidates must have passed the 2nd PUC (Class 12) or equivalent examination with the required subjects based on their preferred course. For Agriculture/Veterinary, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology are required. For Medical and AYUSH, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology are required, and a valid NEET UG score is necessary for counseling. Candidates must have studied in Karnataka for at least seven academic years (from 1st standard to 12th/2nd PUC) and passed their 10th and 12th examinations from Karnataka. Alternatively, either parent must have studied in Karnataka for at least seven years. Other eligibility clauses related to domicile, rural background, defense personnel, and Kannada medium education also exist. Minimum percentage requirements are 45% for the General Category and 40% for Reserved Categories (SC/ST/OBC) in qualifying exams.

eligibility: Candidates with qualifications ranging from B.E./B.Tech., M.Sc., MBA, CA, CMA, to degree in Pharmacy are eligible to apply. Generally requires B.E./B.Tech./B.Sc.(Engg.), M.Sc., MBA, CA, CMA, MCA, or Degree in Pharmacy with minimum 60% marks on full-time regular basis, along with 4 to 26 years of relevant post-qualification work experience depending on the level of post.

Ed./B.Com. Ed. OR Graduation with at least 50% marks and B.Ed (Special Education). Must have passed CTET Paper-II. Candidates must have studied in English medium at the secondary level. eligibility: Eligibility criteria vary by post code. For Scientist/Engineer 'SD' (Post Codes 01-03), candidates generally require a PhD in a relevant field (e.g., RF & Microwave Engineering, Electronics/Communication, Agricultural Physics/Meteorology) along with an M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc (Engg)/MS/M.Sc with a minimum of 60% or CGPA 6.5, or a B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc (Engg) with a minimum of 65% or CGPA 6.84. For Scientist/Engineer 'SC' (M.Sc based, Post Codes 12-16), an M.Sc in a relevant discipline (e.g., Agronomy/Horticulture, Statistics/Mathematics, Physical Oceanography, Marine Biology, Atmospheric Science) with 65% or CGPA 6.84 is needed, along with a B.Sc with 60% or CGPA 6.5. However, outside their native state of application, they will be treated as Un-Reserved category candidates, whose eligibility they must meet before applying for the exam. Maximum age 50 years as on 01.12.2025.

eligibility: For Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the monthly integrated PG degrees in Life Sciences or Biomedical Sciences. Minimum three years of post-qualification experience in areas of Electronic Interlocking/Relay Interlocking/Automatic Signaling/Telecom Works/Kavach.

Minimum one-year experience in Railway Signalling Works OR OFC based communication and networking systems.

eligibility: The qualification requirements for guest faculty recruitment align with the University Grants Commission (UGC) 2018 Regulations for regular Assistant Professors in universities. For Computer Science & Information Technology, qualifications must meet the standards set by UGC/AICTE, New Delhi.

eligibility: Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): 10th Class Passed. Junior Stenographer: 12th Class Passed, Shorthand (Dictation: 10 Mins: 80 WPM, Transcription: 50 Minutes in English, 65 Minutes in Hindi). eligibility: For Revenue Inspector (RI), Assistant Revenue Inspector (ARI), and Amin: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or equivalent from a recognized University with knowledge in computer application. For ICDS Supervisor: Bachelor's Degree in Arts, Science or Commerce or its equivalent (only women candidates). For Village Agricultural Worker (VAW): +2 Science / +2 Agriculture or equivalent. For Junior Fisheries Technical Assistant, knowledge of swimming is also mentioned.

eligibility: For Teacher Educator (Foundation Course): Post-Graduation Degree in Education/Philosophy/Sociology/Psychology with minimum 50% marks AND B.El.Ed or B.Ed. or D.El.Ed with 50% marks OR M.Phil. or Ph.D. in Education. For Teacher Educator (Science, History, Geography, Economics, Political Science, Mathematics, Odia, English): Post-Graduate Degree in the relevant subject with minimum 50% marks AND M.Ed. with minimum 50% marks. eligibility: Educational Qualification: B.E / B.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology / MCA or equivalent degree from a reputed University. Experience: Minimum 2 years of working experience in Software Development/Testing/Maintenance.

eligibility: Graduation in any discipline with 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD). Professional qualifications such as CA/CFA/CMA-ICWA OR MBA/PGDBM (2-year full-time Master's degree in Banking/Finance/Credit-related field) are preferred/required depending on the post and scale. eligibility: Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute with 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/OBC/ PWBD).

OR First class M.Sc. in Biological Stream (Life Sciences / Zoology / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Microbiology / Pharmacology / Toxicology / Immunology or related fields) AND qualified National Eligibility Test (NET) JRF/LS conducted by CSIR-UGC NET or Valid GATE Score by MHRD.

(1st Division) in Zoology/Physical Anthropology/Genetics/Bio-Chemistry/Bio-Technology/Microbiology/Molecular Biology/Forensic Science or its equivalent qualification in any of the above subjects with Zoology/Botany as one of the subjects at B.Sc. level; Three years research and analytical experience in DNA Finger Printing; Hindi/Sanskrit up to Matric standard or Higher Education.

Demonstrated strong research capabilities in terms of publications in reputed peer-reviewed journals of good impact factor and/or patents.

For Scientist-B (Non-Medical – IT/Computer Science): ME/M.Tech in Computer Science from a recognized university, OR ME/M.Tech (Computer Science)/MCA, or a 4-year B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc. (Engineering) in Computer Science/IT with a Ph.D. from a recognized university in a subject related to IT/Computer Science. Desirable: Experience in R&D related to Biomedical Sciences, relevant to the job requirements in Government, Public Sector, or Private Institutions. For Scientist-B (Non-Medical – Pharmacology): Master's degree in Pharmacy (Pharmacology) from a recognized university, OR a Pharm-D degree recognized by UGC/PCI. Desirable: Experience in R&D related to Biomedical Sciences, relevant to the job requirements in Government, Public Sector, or Private Institutions.

title: HSSC Group C Mains Recruitment 2026 (Motor Vehicle Inspector & Other Group C Posts)
eligibility: Matriculation from a recognised Board, (AND) a diploma in Automobile Engineering (three-year course); or a diploma in Mechanical Engineering (three-year course) from a recognised institution; (AND) holding a driving licence authorising to drive motor cycle with gear and light motor vehicles. Candidates must also have qualified the Common Eligibility Test (CET) Group-C Examination.

title: MPSC RTO Recruitment 2026 (Assistant Motor Vehicle Inspector & Other Posts)
eligibility: Candidates must be Indian citizens. For Assistant Motor Vehicle Inspector (AMVI) and other RTO posts, a Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Automobile Engineering, or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university is generally required. A 3-year Diploma in Automobile/Mechanical Engineering or equivalent is also mentioned for AMVI posts. Knowledge of Marathi is mandatory. A valid driving license (often a heavy vehicle driving license) is frequently a prerequisite. At least one year of experience is mentioned for AMVI posts.
